description: For a new transaction, the TC needs to open escrow and order a preliminary title report.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the purchase agreement and contact information for the chosen title/escrow company.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent has the contract and the contact details for the specified escrow officer.

nodes.task_description: Email the purchase agreement to the escrow officer with a request to open escrow.

expected_outcome.expected: A correctly formatted email with the contract attached is sent to the escrow officer.

nodes.task_description: Log the escrow number and preliminary title report delivery date in the transaction management system.

expected_outcome.expected: The TC updates the transaction file with the escrow # and sets a task reminder for the title report.
